title: DoctorReport
description: Output of `llmwiki-cli doctor --json`. Reflects the resolved effective config plus live NIM reachability, so agents can audit a user's wiki installation without re-running `config show-effective`. Schema version is locked to the binary version (`CARGO_PKG_VERSION`); v0.3.17+ uses `active_alias: string | null` (previously `string` with an empty-string sentinel — that change is a BREAKING for old consumers, hence this schema).

active_alias.description: Active wiki-root.toml alias for this workspace, if one is registered. `null` means no alias resolves to this workspace. v0.3.17: changed from `string` with `""` sentinel to `string | null`.

wiki_root_path.description: Path to the resolved `wiki-root.toml`, or empty string if no registry entry matched.

registry_entries.description: Count of entries in the discovered wiki-root.toml registry (0 if no registry was found).

config_loaded.description: Whether the per-workspace / per-computer config was loaded successfully (false if the TOML is invalid).

embed_model.description: Resolved NIM embedding model name from the merged effective config.

nim_base_url.description: Resolved NIM base URL (host only, no `/v1` segment — code appends `/v1` per request).

api_key_length.description: Resolved NIM API key length in bytes. 0 if the key env var is unset or empty. Never contains the key itself.

api_key_env.description: Name of the env var that holds the NIM API key (`NVIDIA_NIM_API_KEY` or the override from `nim.api_key_env`).

nim_reachable.description: Whether `GET {nim_base_url}/v1/models` returned 2xx during this run. False on network error, 4xx, 5xx, or when the key is missing.

nim_status.description: HTTP status from the NIM `/v1/models` probe, or `null` if the request didn't complete (DNS failure, connect error, etc.).

nim_error.description: Human-readable error string from the NIM probe, or `null` on success.

embed_model_available.description: Whether the resolved `embed_model` appears in the live NIM `/v1/models` response. False when the model name is wrong, the NIM catalog doesn't list it, or `nim_reachable` is false.

config.description: Reflective dump of the resolved effective config as dotted-key → value pairs (e.g. `"nim.batch_size": "8"`). Same shape as `wiki config show-effective` text output.

config_sources.description: Per-key source attribution: dotted-key → file-it-came-from. Values are absolute file paths, or `<default>` for built-in defaults. Mirrors the `--source` field in `wiki config show-effective`. v0.3.12+.
